quests.title: Eyes on the Herd
quests.description: Observe the Triceratops herd for 60 seconds without being detected. Learn their formation — calves in the center, bulls facing outward.

objectives.description: Watch the herd for 60 seconds without triggering alert
Count the number of calves in the herd

rewards.survival_tip: Triceratops charge in formation — never stand between two bulls

failure_conditions: Player detected by any herd member
Player gets within 200 units of a bull
quests.emotional_arc: Awe → Respect → Knowledge. Player learns that these creatures are not mindless — they protect their young with coordinated intelligence.

quests.title: Follow the Parasaurs
quests.description: Track the Parasaur herd from the forest edge to the river watering hole. Do not disturb them — we need this migration route mapped.

objectives.description: Locate Parasaur tracks near the tree line
Follow the Parasaur herd to the river without spooking them
Mark the watering hole on your mental map

rewards.knowledge: River watering hole location revealed on map
rewards.survival_tip: Parasaurs call loudly when they sense predators — their alarm cry is your early warning system

failure_conditions: Herd scatters due to player detection
Player loses track of herd for more than 120 seconds
quests.emotional_arc: Curiosity → Patience → Discovery. Player learns to read the land through animal behavior rather than brute force.

quests.title: Know Your Enemy
quests.description: Infiltrate T-Rex territory and map its patrol routes. Do NOT engage. Survival depends on knowing where the apex predator walks.

objectives.description: Observe T-Rex patrol pattern from safe distance (400+ units)
Mark 3 waypoints on the T-Rex patrol route
Exit the danger zone without being detected

rewards.knowledge: T-Rex patrol routes visible on map for 24 in-game hours
rewards.survival_tip: T-Rex vision is motion-based — freeze when it looks your direction

quests.emotional_arc: Fear → Discipline → Mastery. Player confronts the apex predator not with weapons but with wit — and survives by becoming invisible.

quests.title: First Tools
quests.description: Gather materials from the clearing and craft your first stone axe. Without tools, you are prey.

objectives.description: Collect 1 stick from the forest floor
Craft a Stone Axe (2 Rocks + 1 Stick)

rewards.survival_tip: A stone axe can cut wood, skin animals, and defend against small predators

quests.emotional_arc: Helplessness → Agency. The moment the player holds their first tool, they stop being prey and start being a survivor.

crafting_recipes.name: Stone Axe
crafting_recipes.description: A basic cutting and chopping tool. Essential for survival.

crafting_recipes.name: Campfire
crafting_recipes.description: Provides warmth, light, and the ability to cook meat. Keeps predators at bay at night.

crafting_recipes.name: Water Container
crafting_recipes.description: A hollowed rock lined with leaves. Holds enough water for half a day.

crafting_recipes.name: Camouflage Mud Pack
crafting_recipes.description: Reduces player scent signature. Herbivores are less likely to detect you. Lasts 5 in-game minutes.

crafting_recipes.name: Scent Mask Herb Bundle
crafting_recipes.description: Masks human scent from predators. Critical for T-Rex territory infiltration. Lasts 3 in-game minutes.
